items.title: Kenya fuel prices rise sharply despite reduction in tax due to Iran war
items.dek: Diesel prices rise by a record margin despite a reduction in value added tax.
items.body: Diesel prices rise by a record margin despite a reduction in value added tax.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: South Africa names apartheid-era politician as new ambassador to the US
items.dek: Roelf Meyer played a key role as a negotiator during talks to end white-minority rule in South Africa.
items.body: Roelf Meyer played a key role as a negotiator during talks to end white-minority rule in South Africa.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Magyar meets Hungarian president as Trump says next PM 'a good man'
items.dek: The man who ended Viktor Orbán's 16 years of continuous rule, Péter Magyar, is calling for a speedy transfer of power.
items.body: The man who ended Viktor Orbán's 16 years of continuous rule, Péter Magyar, is calling for a speedy transfer of power.
items.author: IriLine Desk
